source_version.binding: input handoff version verified before edits

annotation.summary: Produced a predicate-first specification for every finite sentinel circular doubly linked list. The abstract list is the forward sequence of non-sentinel node addresses; xizi_dllseg owns each forward next field and the matching backward prev field, while xizi_dll owns the closing last-to-head edge. The loop invariant preserves head identity, decomposes l into traversed prefix and remaining suffix, relates the counter to Zlength(prefix), and preserves the UINT_MAX bound. Candidate is locally compileable and canonical direct symexec reaches EOF, but mandatory qcp-mcp session_manager evidence cannot be obtained because qcp-mcp is not installed or exposed in this agent environment.

spec_design.abstract_sequence: non-sentinel node addresses in forward traversal order
spec_design.head_identity_policy: the head parameter is threaded through every recursive segment and every data-node destination is constrained unequal to head

canonical_symexec_evidence.evidence_kind: direct canonical symexec; not qcp-mcp evidence
canonical_symexec_evidence.stdout_summary: Start to symbolic execution; End of symbolic execution; Successfully finished symbolic execution

annotation_checking_evidence.spec_definition_status: passed: recursive predicates express a mathematical finite circular bidirectional shape and do not mirror the C loop

annotation_checking_evidence.invariant_status: passed: head identity, abstract sequence prefix/suffix decomposition, bidirectional edge ownership, counter semantics, and bound are explicit
